title: ProgramFunding
description: A DCLA program grant award to a cultural organization for a fiscal year — the outcome of the Cultural Development Fund (CDF) cycle. Canonical schema reconciling the annual programs-funding datasets: 'DCLA Programs Funding' (y6fv-k6p7, current), 'DCLA Program Funding for FY11' (rskq-5bfv), and 'DCLA: Programs Funding for FY2010' (j8p3-8ufc). Keyed on Application # + Organization + Fiscal Year. NOTE: this publishes the AWARD (who received money); the application itself lives only in the DCLA Grants Management System — see grant-application.json.

applicationNumber.description: DCLA application number ('Application #' / 'Application Number') for the funding cycle.

totalFinalAward.description: Awarded amount in dollars ('Total Final Award' / 'FY10 Programs $').
